channel.title: optimization on cgois
channel.description: Recent content in optimization on cgois

item.title: Semidefinite programming in quantum information
item.description: A tutorial with a bunch of examples of using SDP in quantum information problems (entanglement, joint measurability, violation of Bell inequalities…), written in Python, Julia and Mathematica.

item.title: CVXPY vs. PICOS: performance comparison for linear programs
item.description: CVXPY and PICOS are two frequently used optimization program modelling tools for Python. I compare their performance in modelling simple random linear programs.
